title: mentha ochroleuca
intro: Mentha ochroleuca, also known as Lemon Mint or Green Lemon Mint, is a species of mint that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is commonly used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mentha ochroleuca include reducing digestive issues, alleviating headaches and fever, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to treat various ailments, or as a culinary herb to add flavor to various dishes.
